(12-15 Arishta to Father) 12-14. The death of the father may be expected, if
th
Rahu, Śani, or Mangal are in the 4 from Sūrya at the time of transit of Śani
through any of the above three Rāśis (Trikon Rāśis). The death of the
father will come to pass by such transit, if at that time Śani, associated, or
th
aspected by a malefic, be in the 9 from Lagn, or Candr and/or the Dasa of
th
the Lord of the 4 from Lagn be in operation. The death does not take

place, if a favourable Dasa be in force at the time of Śani‟s transit. This
should be kept in mind by the Jyotishis, while making predictions.
